Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Gloria C. Amell, Esq. appeared for petitioner Amber Murphy, the Guardian ad litem for the minor Meggan Walker. Neither the guardian ad litem nor the minor were present at today's hearing.
Order waiving the guardian ad litem's appearance at today's hearing was filed January 14, 2009.

On the basis of the evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $33,952.00.
Attorney's Fees - $7,274.57.
Costs - $4,722.23.

A net balance of $21,995.20 shall to be deposited into a blocked account with the Bank of America located at 12682 Amargosa Road, Victorville, CA 92392. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Additionally, the Court Orders that future settlement from other bankruptcy trusts in this action as may be recommended by counsel may be accepted by Petitioner, acting on behalf of the Minor, and that 15% of the net settlements, after 15% of costs incurred and attorney fees of 25% are deducted, shall be disbursed on behalf of the Minor prusuant to this Order, without the necessity of further petition being made to this Court.

Orders Approving the Compromise of the Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
